text: International Higher Education (IHE) provides high-level commentary and rigorous analysis on the evolving trends and critical challenges facing global higher education. This publication serves as a vital resource for institutions and stakeholders, exploring the complexities of international collaboration—ranging from the logistical hurdles of disparate regulatory systems and credit frameworks to the "vexing" debates surrounding the legitimacy and accreditation of joint and double degrees. By examining the impact of shifting student mobility patterns and the essential role of the academic profession, IHE offers the nuanced perspective necessary to navigate the increasingly interconnected global academic landscape.
